## Notes

- `Other` buckets count cases in fixtures without a `_differential`/`_metamorphic`/`_adversarial` filename marker (e.g. `dtype_promotion_cases.json`, `ufunc_input_cases.json`).
- `rng` aggregates `rng_differential`, `rng_metamorphic`, `rng_adversarial`, `rng_distribution_differential`, and `rng_statistical_cases`.
- `runtime_policy` includes `runtime_policy_cases` + `override_audit_cases`.
- Fixtures under `fixtures/oracle_outputs/` are excluded (those are comparator mismatch reports, not primary case inputs).
- Packet subdirectories (e.g. `packet002_dtype/`) are traversed recursively and their cases are merged into the matching top-level domain.
